positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial wreath motif featuring bioluminescent flora and intertwined mystical roots. The centerpiece design should be a perfect circular emblem suitable for apparel printing. Elements include glowing crescent moons, stylized cosmic nebulae, detailed fantasy botanical elements (ethereal ferns, glowing blossoms), and geometric Art Nouveau lines. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep midnight blues, vibrant sapphire blues, glowing cyan, and contrasting gold accents. The overall style must be a clean, highly illustrative vector graphic design with sharp outlines, strong silhouette, and deep, rich dimensionality, reminiscent of intricate tattoo flash art merged with celestial science. The composition must be centered, maximalist, and isolated on a clean background.
negative: blur, fuzzy, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, mutated, poorly drawn, low resolution, ugly, monochrome, jpeg artifacts, photorealism
